name: Aged One's Exultation
description: Aged One's Exultation is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a talisman found in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Aged One's Exultation makes madness in the vicinity increase the player's attack power. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Aged One's Exultation: 
 Abyssal Woods: Dropped by the Aging Untouchable found nearest to the Abandoned Church. After the enemy's grab attack is parried, the Aging Untouchable enters a vulnerable state in which it can be damaged. [Elden Ring Map]

name: Ailment Talisman
description: Ailment Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Ailment Talisman raises resistance to the last ailment suffered. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Ailment Talisman: 
 The Ailment Talisman can be looted from a corpse. The body can be found lying at the edge of an unfinished wooden bridge of the Abandoned Ailing Village. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map]

name: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman
description: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman increases the effective range of bows and raises the attack power of arrows and bolts. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman: 
 Found on top of a tower at Fog Rift Fort. From within the door of the tower where Black Knight Garrew was, go through a gap between the tower and the rock wall to the east of the doorway. Hop down onto the wooden pathway and follow it until you see a ladder on your right. Take it up, after which you'll see another ladder on your left. Take it to the uppermost level of the tower. Here you can find the treasure chest containing the Talisman. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Beloved Stardust
description: Beloved Stardust is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Beloved Stardust shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Beloved Stardust: 
 Given by Count Ymir after completing the first part of his quest line. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Blade of Mercy
description: Blade of Mercy is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Blade of Mercy raises attack power after each critical hit. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Blade of Mercy: 
 From the Scorched Ruins Site of Grace, go south down the path. Just a bit after passing under the bridge above, there will be 2 small trees to your left. Turn west and you will see a small stairway. Go up the four steps, then head south up a slight slope to find a stairway to the west. Follow this path around, up some more stairs, north up a small clothed rooftop and some more stairs up, and then east across the cloth draped roof of the bridge. Go up the stairs to the north and open the door. Inside is a chest, open it to find the item. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
description: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Blessed Blue Dew Talisman slowly restores FP. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Blessed Blue Dew Talisman: 
 Church of Benediction. Head inside the church and investigate the statue of Marika to find the Blessed Blue Dew Talisman [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Boltdrake Talisman +3
description: Boltdrake Talisman +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Boltdrake Talisman +3 reduces Lightning Damage taken by 22%. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Boltdrake Talisman +3 can be found at Shadow Keep. From the Storehouse: First Floor site of grace, take the stairs up to the second floor and find a dead-end with several shade protectors. Jump over the railing to reach a room with the talisman, then use the lever to move the bookcase and re-emerge near the site of grace. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]Alternatively, From Storehouse, Back Section site of grace, immediately turn around and head east through the doorway, shortly after passing through the doorway, look to down to your left and there should be a large rectangular table that you can safely jump down to. The talisman should be right behind you on the floor next to that table.Where to find Boltdrake Talisman variants:Base Game 
 Boltdrake Talisman at Stormveil Castle. When you reach the main castle grounds where you fight the Lion Guardian, head inside the room with the armored statues, and through the arch doorway, to reach the Limgrave Tower Bridge Site of Grace. Specifically, you'll find the on a body that you can loot, just at the top of the first set of stairs, resting against a pillar on the left side. [Map link] 
 Boltdrake Talisman +1: This more-powerful variant of the Boltdrake Talisman can be found in a storage shed inside the Old Altus Tunnel dungeon. [Map link] 
 Boltdrake Talisman +2: Found on a corpse hanging off an opening in a tall tower south of the Dragon Temple Rooftop Site of Grace. Reaching this area is a bit complex: [Map link] [Video Location, Crumbling Farum Azula] 
   
   You will first need to head southeast to the large plaza guarded by a stationary Farum Azula Dragon, which is constantly raining red lightning all around the area. 
   From here, look northeast, then drop down a series of cliffs to the east to reach the opening at the bottom of a large building. 
   Follow the linear path here to a balcony with a ladder leading up to a terrace. Mind the Banished Knights patrolling the area. 
   Directly in front of the ladder is a lift building; to your left is a chest with the Dragon Towershield. Take the lift up to a series of slopes leading to a hallway underneath the same bridge you crossed to get to the southeast plaza. 
   The passage ahead has a Crucible Knight fighting a couple of Beastmen. Fight your way through the hallway (or just run past the enemies) to reach a ladder at the end. 
   Climb up the ladder to reach an open window where the corpse holding the talisman can be found.

name: Cerulean Amber Medallion +3
description: Cerulean Amber Medallion +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Cerulean Amber Medallion +3 boosts maximum FP by 12.5%. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Cerulean Amber Medallion +3 can be obtained after defeating the Death Knight in Scorpion River Catacombs. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map] [Video Link] Where to find Cerulean Amber Medallion variants:Base Game 
 Cerulean Amber Medallion: Lakeside Crystal Cave: After defeating the Bloodhound Knight. [Map link] 
 Cerulean Amber Medallion +1: Castle Sol: Found on a corpse hanging by a wooden ledge above the southern walls of the castle. This area is accessed by climbing a ladder behind the church in the southeast and following the walls west. Beware the very powerful dual sword knight guarding the area. He can teleport behind you and perform long combos. [Map link] 
 Cerulean Amber Medallion +2: Lunar Estate Ruins: Found in a treasure chest in an underground room in the northwestern half of the ruins. Look for an Imp Statue pressed up against the wall. This requires one Stonesword Key. The stairs are also concealed by an illusory floor. Simply hit the floor next to the Imp Statue to reveal the stairs. [Map link]

name: Cerulean Seed Talisman +1
description: Cerulean Seed Talisman +1 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. Cerulean Seed Talisman +1 boosts FP restoration from Flask of Cerulean Tears by 30%. Players can use talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location: Location unknown.

name: Clarifying Horn Charm +2
description: Clarifying Horn Charm +2 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Clarifying Horn Charm +2 raises Focus by 230, improving resistance to Sleep and Madness. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Clarifying Horn Charm +2 can be found in Lamenter's Gaol. After dropping down the small cave infested with rats, continue following the path and go straight. You'll find this talisman on a corpse on the right side once you enter the area.  [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]Where to find Clarifying Horn Charm variants:Base Game 
 Clarifying Horn Charm: Can be found on a corpse lying on the stairs leading to the lift going up to the Deep Siofra Well. [Elden Ring Interactive Map Link] 
 Clarifying Horn Charm +1: Found on a corpse in the middle and at the lowest floor of a ruin in Nokron, Eternal City. This is above an earlier area in Siofra River. To get there, head southeast from Ancestral Woods Site of Grace, and follow the brick path until it ends at a cliff. Turn left and follow the cliff edge as far as you can, then carefully drop onto the ruins roof. Follow this raised pathway northeast until you reach a square open platform. Descend carefully, and the talisman is found on a corpse in the center. [Map link] [Video location]

name: Crimson Amber Medallion +3
description: Crimson Amber Medallion +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Crimson Amber Medallion +3 raises the maximum HP by 10%. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
The Crimson Amber Medallion +3 can be obtained as a reward upon defeating the Death Knight boss located at the Fog Rift Catacombs. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]Where to find Crimson Amber Medallion variants:Base Game 
 Crimson Amber Medallion: Can be purchased from the Nomadic Merchant at the eastern side of Weeping Peninsula, for  1,500 Runes. [Map link]  [Video Location] 
 Crimson Amber Medallion +1: Found in Volcano Manor. Go to the Prison Town Church Site of Grace, go out and through the little town as if you were progressing through the manor as normal, and use a Stonesword Key to go through the fog gate. An Abductor Virgin is there, but you can easily run up the stairs to the level above, where the talisman is on a dead body. [Map link] Video Location 
 Crimson Amber Medallion +2: SPOILER WARNING: Can be found just southwest of the Leyndell, Ashen Capital Site of Grace, by dropping down the open sewer grate to the beam below. [Map link] Video Location

name: Crimson Seed Talisman +1
description: Crimson Seed Talisman +1 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Crimson Seed Talisman +1 boosts HP restoration from the Flask of Crimson Tears by 30%. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location: Location unknown.

name: Crusade Insignia
description: Crusade Insignia is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Crusade Insignia raises attack power after defeating an enemy. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Crusade Insignia: 
  The Crusade Insignia Talisman is acquired upon defeating the Fire Knight Queelign NPC Invader the first time, which can be in Belurat Tower Settlement [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location] or at the Church of the Crusade.

name: Dried Bouquet
description: Dried Bouquet is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Dried Bouquet raises attack power when summoned spirit dies. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Dried Bouquet:Belurat Tower Settlement: 
 Found in a small room hidden behind debris in the area you fight several Man-Fly enemies. 
 From where you got the Bone Bow, as you exit the doorway, make a hard left and you'll see a pile of rubble that you can jump on and you'll see there's a secret room tucked behind it. Go inside a large storeroom where you can find the following items: x5 Thin Beast Bones, x1 Scadutree Fragment, and x1 Dried Bouquet.  [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location] 
 You can click on the images below to enlarge them.

name: Enraged Divine Beast
description: Enraged Divine Beast is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Enraged Divine Beast raises potency of storms. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Enraged Divine Beast: 
 Can be selected as one of the possible rewards when trading Remembrance of the Dancing Lion with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.  
   
   The other available reward is Ash of War: Divine Beast Frost Stomp.

name: Fine Crucible Feather Talisman
description: Fine Crucible Feather Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Fine Crucible Feather Talisman improves backsteps, but increases damage taken by 15%. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Fine Crucible Feather Talisman: 
 Ancient Ruins of Rauh: From the Rauh Ancient Ruins, East site of grace, travel to the northwest through the cave until you reach a room with two branches, then climb up the branch and jump to the other branch on the left. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map] [Video Location]

name: Flamedrake Talisman +3
description: Flamedrake Talisman +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Flamedrake Talisman +3 reduces Fire Damage taken by 22% (Effect reduced to 7% in PvP). Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Flamedrake Talisman +3 can be found at the Fort of Reprimand inside a chest. Entering through the front gate, go down the staircase in the back right corner. Continue through the doorway on the left side of the hallway and follow this path until you see two soldiers standing in front of a body. Climb over the cages to their left and it will lead you to the chest that contains the talisman. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]Where to find Flamedrake Talisman variants:Base Game 
 Flamedrake Talisman: Dropped by the Beastman of Farum Azula in Groveside Cave in Limgrave. [Map link] 
 Flamedrake Talisman +1: Found at Leyndell Royal Capital, head up the elevator leading towards the Grand Lift of Rold, on the ground against a column. [Map link] 
 Flamedrake Talisman +2: Dropped by the Beastman of Farum Azula in Dragonbarrow Cave in eastern Dragonbarrow. [Map link]

name: Golden Braid
description: Golden Braid is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Golden Braid boosts holy damage negation by 22%. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Golden Braid: 
 Shaman Village, Scaduview: The talisman is looted in front of a statue at the top of the hill found inside the trunk of a large decayed tree (the only dead tree there) in the Shaman Village of the Scaduview region. Closest graces are Hinterland and Hinterland Bridge.[Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Immunizing Horn Charm +2
description: Immunizing Horn Charm +2 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Immunizing Horn Charm +2 raises Immunity by 180, improving resistance to Poison and Scarlet Rot. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Immunizing Horn Charm +2 drops upon defeating the Lesser Ulcerated Tree Spirit in the sewers section of Belurat Tower Settlement. [Map Link] [Video Location] Requires the Well Depths Key to unlock the gate leading to the sewers.Where to find Immunizing Horn Charm variants:Base Game 
 Immunizing Horn Charm: Found on one of the corpses in an ant nest in Ainsel River. [Map link] [Video location] 
 Immunizing Horn Charm +1: Found in the Lake of Rot, as a guaranteed item drop from the Ancestral Follower southeast of the Lake of Rot Shoreside Site of Grace. [Map link]

name: Lacerating Crossed-Tree
description: Lacerating Crossed-Tree is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Lacerating Crossed-Tree enhances dash attacks. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats. Not to be confused with the Retaliatory Crossed-Tree talisman.
location:
Where to find Lacerating Crossed-Tree: 
 You get it from aiding Needle Knight Leda in invading and defeating Hornsent after she chooses him as a target, you have to go back to the Highroad Cross site of grace and talk to her after doing so and she will give the talisman to you. Assisting Leda here (and gaining the Lacerating Crossed-Tree Talisman) will prevent you from getting the Swift Slash Ash of War, as that is the reward for aiding Hornsent in this part of his quest. 
 If you defeat Messmer in Shadow Keep, you will be unable to acquire this item as the Hornsent invasion / assist signs will disappear.

name: Mottled Necklace +2
description: Mottled Necklace +2 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Mottled Necklace +2 raises Immunity, Robustness, and Focus by 100. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Mottled Necklace +2 can be found in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh just after getting past the Furnace Golem across the bridge. You must make your way through the ruin it was in front of, and once at the top proceed past the large stone structure all the way to the end of the area and unblock the spirit spring.  Then jump down onto the spring and jump back up to the opposite side. The necklace will be in a chest at the top of the stairs. Alternatively, you can use the Margit shackle or Mohg shackle to unblock the spirit spring by throwing it onto the pile of rocks. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] Where to find Mottled Necklace variants:Base Game 
 Mottled Necklace: Found at the very edge of the ruined bridge leading to Nokron, Eternal City. This area is accessible via waygate at The Four Belfries through the waygate labeled "night sky unceasing". [Map link] 
 Mottled Necklace +1 Version - Can be found on a corpse on top of some ruined arches overlooking Hallowhorn Grounds in Nokron, Eternal City. From the stairway leading up to the Hallowhorn Grounds, circle around the left side of the structure and follow the inclines uphill as much as possible. You should eventually be able to get on top of the Hallowhorn Grounds structure. [Map link]

name: Outer God Heirloom
description: Outer God Heirloom is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Outer God Heirloom raises arcane. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Outer God Heirloom: 
 Found inside a chest inside a small building at the top of Prospect Town. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Pearl Shield Talisman
description: Pearl Shield Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Pearl Shield Talisman boosts all non-physical damage negation while guarding. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Pearl Shield Talisman: 
 Found inside a chest in a small camp of Messmer soldiers in the woods. Southwestern of Taylew's Ruined Forge Site of Grace. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map]

name: Pearldrake Talisman +3
description: Pearldrake Talisman +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. Pearldrake Talisman +3 reduces Elemental Damage taken by 11%. Players can use talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Pearldrake Talisman +3 Can be found within Shadow Keep, Specimen Storehouse. You must progress until the seventh floor to pull the lever that moves the statues. Once you do this, return to the third floor and find the head of the statue to pull this item from its beard. One way to do this is to visit the Storehouse, Fourth Floor site of grace, turn around and go East to the railing, then do a big jump from the railing to the feet of the statue below. After landing, run across the statue's back until you can drop down and loot the talisman. [Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]Where to find Pearldrake Talisman variants:Base Game 
 Pearldrake Talisman: Can be found beyond the lowest ("Crumbling Lands") waygate of the Four Belfries. Go through the waygate, then jump down to the north, then jump down to the east (and if you can, use ranged attacks to kill the two beastmen below), then jump down again, then jump down (to the north) one more time.  
 Pearldrake Talisman +1: Can be found in Wyndham Ruins in the Mt. Gelmir region. The talisman is found inside a chest at the end of the area sealed by an Imp Statue; a Stonesword Key is required. [Map link] 
 Pearldrake Talisman +2: Can be found in Miquella's Haligtree. Travel to the Haligtree Town Site of Grace and exit through the northwestern door. Then climb the ladder and turn around to jump southeast across the gap. The talisman will be located on a corpse at the base of a statue, guarded by a Misbegotten Warrior. [Map link] Video Location

name: Rellana's Cameo
description: Rellana's Cameo is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Rellana's Cameo enhances attacks executed after maintaining the same stance for a while. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Rellana's Cameo: 
 Located in Castle Ensis just behind hostile NPC Moonrithyll, lying on an altar. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map] [Video Location]

name: Retaliatory Crossed-Tree
description: Retaliatory Crossed-Tree is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Retaliatory Crossed-Tree enhances attacks executed after rolling or backstepping. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats. Not to be confused with the Lacerating Crossed-Tree talisman.
location:
Where to find Retaliatory Crossed-Tree: 
 You need to follow Leda's questline, and invade Ansbach. Then return to the grace where you speak with Leda and say your farewells. She will give you this talisman before her dialogue ends. 
 Choosing to assist Hornsent in the previous invasion will lock you out of this talisman for the playthrough.

name: Sharpshot Talisman
description: Sharpshot Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sharpshot Talisman boosts attack power of precision-aimed shots. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Sharpshot Talisman: 
 Found inside Albinauric's Shack in Scaduview. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map]

name: Shattered Stone Talisman
description: Shattered Stone Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Shattered Stone Talisman rises potency of kicking and stomping skills. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Shattered Stone Talisman: 
 Moorth Ruins. From Moorth Ruins Site of Grace head South-East through the big stony archway. You'll directly head towards a house ruin. You can go through the house's doorway, exit on the small roof, turn left and around the corner you'll find the talisman lying there on a corpse. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Smithing Talisman
description: Smithing Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Smithing Talisman enhances weapon-throwing attacks. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Smithing Talisman: 
 Ruined Forge Starfall Past [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] 
 The talisman is looted from a corpse. The body is inside a room filled with Fire Blob enemies, on the upper-most level of the Ruined Forge of Starfall Past.

name: Spelldrake Talisman +3
description: Spelldrake Talisman +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a talisman found in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Spelldrake Talisman +3 reduces Magic Damage taken by 22% in PVE and 7% for PVP. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
The Spelldrake Talisman +3 can be looted from a corpse near the Castle Front site of Grace near Castle Ensis. From the Castle Front site of Grace, If you go directly north you can drop off of the cliffside and then follow the path east which will lead you to the storeroom where the talisman is located. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] Where to find Spelldrake Talisman and other variants: 
 Spelldrake Talisman: Acquired by defeating Runebear at the end of the Earthbore Cave in the Weeping Peninsula. [Map Link] 
 Spelldrake Talisman +1: Sellia, Town of Sorcery: Found in a small room in the northwest section of town, right under the balcony containing the Staff of Loss. This room is initially sealed by a barrier that can be dispelled by lighting a brazier atop a tower in the southwest of town. [Map Link] 
 Spelldrake Talisman +2: Found in the secret catacombs underneath the Hidden Path to the Haligtree by turning right just before the Stray Mimic Tear's boss door, following the corridor up and taking the lift. The talisman can be found on a corpse in an alcove at the top. See the location's page for details on how to get to the catacombs. [Map Link]

name: St. Trina's Smile
description: St. Trina's Smile is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. It increases attack power when the sleep status effect is in the vicinity. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find St. Trina's Smile: 
 Obtained as a drop upon defeating a hostile NPC, Thiollier. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] 
 Thiollier only becomes hostile if you pursue St. Trina and Thiollier's quest. Please visit their pages for the quest guide.

name: Stalwart Horn Charm +2
description: Stalwart Horn Charm +2 is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Stalwart Horn Charm +2 raises Robustness by 180, improving resistance to Blood Loss and Frost. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Shadow of the ErdtreeThe Stalwart Horn Charm +2 can be found at Bonny Gaol. After you jump down the hole, head east past the rats and climb up the ladder. Defeat the Inner Jar monster, you will find the talisman in the room. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]Where to find Stalwart Horn Charm variants:Base Game 
 Stalwart Horn Charm: Uld Palace Ruins in northeastern Liurnia of the Lakes: Go to the Mausoleum Compound and head north up the incline, then turn West as soon as you pass the horizontal rocks to your left. Proceed forward to the large vertical rock formation. There will be a smaller vertical rock formation on your right. Walk around the larger formation counter-clockwise until you see a hole in the wall. Go through it and you will find the talisman on a corpse to your left overhanging a cliff. [Map link] 
 Stalwart Horn Charm +1: Can be found in the southwestern area of Consecrated Snowfield, southeast of Yelough Anix Tunnel entrance. Alternatively, go straight southwest from the Inner Consecrated Snowfield Site of Grace. It is located on a corpse slumped over a log, and is guarded by Ancestral Follower and Ancestral Follower Shaman whose singing can be heard once you are nearby. [Map link]

name: Talisman of All Crucibles
description: Talisman of All Crucibles is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Talisman of All Crucibles grants effects of all crucible talismans. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Talisman of All Crucibles: 
 Start at the Ancient Ruins, Grand Stairway Site of Grace, head southwest to the elevator. At bottom of the elevator looking south west, there is 2 paths of floating platforms, go to the left one, following it around and it loops to chest with this talisman.  [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Talisman of Lord's Bestowal
description: Talisman of Lord's Bestowal is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Talisman of Lord's Bestowal increases poise after using a flask of tears. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Talisman of Lord's Bestowal: 
 Shadow Keep. Can be found beside the big golden tree. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

name: Talisman of the Dread
description: Talisman of the Dread is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Talisman of the Dread raises potency of magma. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Talisman of the Dread: 
 Elder's Hovel: Can be found on a corpse inside Elder's Hovel. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Two-Handed Sword Talisman
description: Two-Handed Sword Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Two-Handed Sword Talisman enhances attacks with two-handed weapons. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Two-Handed Sword Talisman: 
 Temple Town Ruins: Found inside the highest structure. After the fight with the Horned Warrior, just continue up the stairs into the next room to find a chest with this item inside. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Interactive Map]

name: Two-Headed Turtle Talisman
description: Two-Headed Turtle Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Talisman in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Two-Headed Turtle Talisman greatly raises Stamina recovery speed by 10 per second (22.5%). Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Two-Headed Turtle Talisman: 
 It's inside a cave beneath a waterfall guarded by enemies Just east of Rivermouth Cave. [Map Link]

name: Verdigris Discus
description: Verdigris Discus is a Talisman in Elden Ring in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Verdigris Discus raises defense with higher equipment load. Players can use Talismans in Elden Ring to boost a variety of Stats.
location:
Where to find Verdigris Discus: 
 Due west of the Highroad Cross site of grace is a waygate that can be unlocked with an Imbued Sword Key. Once through the waygate, walk uphill to see two waterfalls flowing in front of a set of stone arches. Through the middle of the two waterfalls, and past a Divine Bird Warrior, is a statue with this talisman at its base. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Viridian Amber Medallion +3

location: Location unknown.
